steps: In a 15 mL falcon tube, combine 1.667 mL of pH 6.8 Tris, 3 mL of 100% glycerol, and 5 mL of DTT.
Once mixed, in the fume hood, add 1 g of SDS. Shake until SDS in completely in solution (this takes a while!).
If under 10 mL, fill with water to 10 mL mark.
Distribute 1 mL aliquots in Eppendorf tubes and store on the bottom shelf of the fridge. /\
creator: Haven Himmighoefer
